title: Solving (some) formal math olympiad problems
titleZh: 解决（一些）正式的数学奥林匹克问题
summary: We built a neural theorem prover for Lean that learned to solve a variety of challenging high-school olympiad problems, including problems from the AMC12 and AIME competitions, as well as two problems adapted from the IMO.
summaryZh: 我们为Lean构建了一个神经定理证明器，学习解决各种具有挑战性的高中奥运会问题，包括AMC12和AIME比赛的问题，以及改编自IMO的两个问题。
highlights: We built a neural theorem prover for Lean that learned to solve a variety of challenging high-school olympiad problems, including problems from the AMC12 and AIME competitions, as
highlightsZh: 我们为Lean构建了一个神经定理证明器，学习解决各种具有挑战性的高中奥运会问题，包括AMC12和AIME比赛的问题，以及改编自IMO的两个问题。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。
